cases.prompt: The codebase feels sloppy after a month of fast building — improve the architecture.
Clean up the codebase structure; find where to modularize.
Extract the email sender into an adapter — we already know exactly what we want.
Summarize the plot of Romeo and Juliet in three sentences.
Suggest a name for a new coffee shop downtown.
This bug has resisted my first fix attempt — it's a hard one, diagnose it properly.
